styles.label: Japandi
styles.summary: Quiet natural materials, low profiles, and warm restraint.

styles.label: Scandinavian Practical
styles.summary: Bright, functional, easy-to-source furniture with controlled color.

styles.label: Organic Modern
styles.summary: Curved furniture, earthy texture, and natural stone/wood cues.

styles.label: Mid-Century Modern
styles.summary: Walnut, tapered legs, classic silhouettes, and warm accents.

styles.label: Soft Industrial
styles.summary: Blackened metal, leather, and urban texture without changing the shell.

styles.label: Contemporary Hotel
styles.summary: Polished, tonal, low-clutter comfort with boutique-hotel cues.

styles.label: Eclectic Collected
styles.summary: Layered personal objects, mixed eras, color, and plants.

styles.label: Bauhaus/Postmodern Pop
styles.summary: Graphic shapes, primary colors, modular forms, and playful contrast.

items.prompt:
Use case: precise-object-edit
Asset type: equirectangular 360 panorama for an interior design planning web gallery
Input image: use the provided living-room reference panorama as the visual reference.
Primary request: Create a Japandi calm living room furnishing concept in the same reference apartment.
Preserve exactly: seamless equirectangular 360 panorama format, camera position, room geometry, wall/window/door locations, balcony glazing, ceiling height, built-in kitchen and hallway openings, floor footprint, daylight direction, and all fixed architectural fixtures.
Change only: furniture, textiles, movable decor, rugs, lamps, plants, and styling.
Design direction: restrained Japandi rental-apartment plan with low-profile light oak sofa frame, warm ivory upholstery, slim round nesting table, woven jute rug, one linen floor lamp, pale wood media console, two small sculptural ceramic pieces, and one restrained green plant. Keep walking paths clear and furniture scaled for a compact one-bedroom apartment.
Quality: photorealistic interior visualization, realistic shadows, cohesive panoramic continuity, no duplicated furniture at seam.
Negative constraints: no people, pets, logos, labels, text, watermark, structural changes, impossible furniture scale, blocked doors, changed windows, changed kitchen, or altered view outside.
items.notes: Lowest-risk Japandi option with compact, light-toned pieces.

Panorama seam controls: keep the image as a seamless equirectangular 360 panorama. The left and right image edges must match cleanly when wrapped.
